2025.0414.name: arf arf
2025.0414.bio:
# Home
- __Refined home experience__
    - The Home tab has been merged with related pages to bring a unified experience or something like that. This is still a **work in progress** and was originally going to release at a later date but is bundled in this major update.

# Navigation
- __Fixed recent Last.fm change__
    - It will look basically identical to before except 'Music' and 'Charts' tabs are now gone as they are accessible by clicking the cute *bleh* logo. In the future, this button may have an option to change it's default destination.

# Branding
- __Changed the bleh logo to be cuter__

# Build
- __bleh now uses ESMBuild__
    - Thanks to the lovely work by @yourfriendoss. If you encounter any issues please report on GitHub.

# Other
- __Redesigned the profile settings a bit__
    - Now with a banner and about me live preview!
- Begun work on changing the translation system
    - This will result in translation keys also being modernised.

2025.0402.name: redesign!! i suppose!!
2025.0402.bio:
its here finally sorry it took so long!! ive been going back and forth in my mind since the start of the year on bleh's design and originally had a much broader redesign planned, which ended up getting scrapped and turned into the hybrid design we have now :3 is it the best? in my opinion, no, but ive spent too much time on it at this point and need to just lift it off my shoulders so i can work on other things 😭

because of that this wont be a normal changelog, go look around!!

^~^

2025.0201.name: notificationz
2025.0201.bio:
just a minor bugfix update as monthly listening reports will be rolling out and everyone will see this bug lol. big final bleh redesign soon<3

# Notifications
- Fixed notifications that don't explicitly mention a user crashing
    - Contributed by @Poligoner

# Other
- Updated badges

2025.0125.name: mouse pt. 2
2025.0125.bio:
# Icons
- __Replaced (almost every) icon with a new icon library__
    - These should be cleaner, easier to read, and more awesome :3
    - They now have a slightly smaller stroke width but went from 16px in size to 18px.
    - Still a work-in-progress in some areas

# Settings
- Fixed view selectors not applying until page refresh

# Events
- Fixed festivals having missing attendance buttons

2025.0124.name: mouse
2025.0124.bio:
# Settings
- __Redesigned the colour selector page from the ground up__
    - Automatically generated, built on the latest designs, etc.
- Seasonal colours are now displayed in a dropdown when applicable
- The 'create a colour' modal has been replaced

![colours!!](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/colours.png)

# Tracks
- __Now playing tracks are coloured based on album art by default__
- __Fixed HTML tags displaying in tracklists__

![haiii](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/sanitise.png)

# UI
- __Animations have been completely re-thought out__
    - Mostly quick fades to make the world of bleh:tm: feel more responsive.
- Cards, menus, and modals now have borders in all themes again
- Menus are now more rounded to fit menu items
- 'Special' (coloured) menu items now have more opaque hover backgrounds
- Standardised spacing in menus
- Tooltips now use their own background layer
- Greatly increased shadows behinds cards and modals
- Increased roundness of cards and modals
- Fixed gallery button colours
- Fixed minor footer issues and things with the previous release

# Wiki
- External links in wikis now have tooltips showing their destination

# API
- Added the ability to input an API key for future features
    - Hidden behind a feature flag right now fwiw.

# Setup
- Expanded width and jankily updated to support new colours
    - Redesign coming eventually hopefully..

2025.0118.name: raaah
2025.0118.bio:
# Music and Library
- __Artist pages that share multiple artists are now beginning to be detected__
    - This is very early work-in-progress and only visible at the top of artist pages at the moment. Will be expanded into tracklists and the 'about artist' panel etc. over time.
- Fixed `cta is null` bug in library pages
    - randomly encountered it last night
- Fixed wiki breakage on pages with a wiki button as appose to text
- When a tracklist is inaccessible, the info box is now translatable
- More tags are now supported when formatting features
    - Such as `(Spotify)`

# Navigation
- Selected tabs now use your primary colour

# Modals
- Modal footers have been adjusted

# Log in / Sign up
- You can now access these pages again
- Made input boxes easier to see on these pages
- Added notification stating why bleh is not active

# Other
- Fixed crash when you have no notifications
- Fixed user buttons when hovering over avatar in wiki history
- Fixed margin on event select panel
- Moved activity list below reports
- Fixed highlight notification active colour
- The card background saturation slider is no longer accessible in light theme
    - It had no noticeable effect
- Pagination buttons now match normal buttons
- Card shadow in dark themes has been adjusted slightly

2025.0114.name: lotz of efficiency
2025.0114.bio:
hey!! this is the first minor? i guess release of the year. if you installed the last update (that'd be 2025.0113.2), you may have seen a warning about this update - turns out that wasn't necessary after all so oopsie :3 if you turned that off it seems you can safely turn it back on but it won't affect you either way.

anyway, here you go :3

# Loading
- __The way the stylesheet (eg. colours) and the main script (eg. layout) loads has been changed__
    - The stylesheet will now attempt to load as soon as the browser allows. **This essentially removes the majority of what I call 'white flashes' of unthemed Last.fm when it decides to randomly reload.**
    - The page will be cloaked in the background colour corresponding to your current theme (from light to midnight) until full loading is complete.
    - **If you were using Stylus to load the theme along with Tampermonkey, please try this out long term as Stylus is not recommended.**
    - Experiencing issues with this? Please reach out on Github.
- The method used to prevent style loading on Labs & Playback pages is probably optimised?

# Obsessions
- Made obsession grid layout match Last.fm to remove excess item on the bottom row
    - From six items per row to five, six felt better but it left this random item left alone at the bottom.

# 2025.0113.1
- Fixed crashes related to Pro accounts without custom badges

# Other
- Changed `run-at` to `document-start` to facilitate these changes
- Replaced tippy.js import to be both fixed to a version and import a version without bundled styling
    - This was causing the script to break in some extensions and was why I originally enabled that warning.
- Removed `addStyle` permission as it hasn't been in use for many months
- Fixed 503 error pages

i accidentally named this changelog file 2024 at first oops

2025.0113.bio:
heyy!! this is the first major release to celebrate 2025, i hope you all enjoy >.<

# Music
- __Fixed some pages (eg. Death Grips) being completely broken__
    - Death Grips seems to be specifically changed on Last.fm's side due to I guess the fact you can download their music? This was an actual nightmare to fix but it seems to all be working now on normal artist, album, tracks and specifically for Death Grips (both pro and non-pro).
- __Fixed page inconsistencies between pro and non-pro__
    - Weird spacing issues and anything related to the above.
- Added notice for pages with video previews disabled (once again, Death Grips)
- __There is now an additional + button next to listens to view for a specific user__
    - Saves the hassle of creating the URL yourself.
- User-created tags are now coloured on your end
- Viewing top listeners in the case either you or someone who has you ignored is present no longer crashes

![Custom user](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/custom.png)

# Shouts
- __The shout avatar hoverbox now includes three quick actions__
    - These allow you to view their profile, view their library, and leave them a shout :3
- __Your shout name colour now reflects your primary badge__
    - Shout name colours can be disabled per usual in the Accessibility settings.
- Your shout avatar now glows in the same colour as above

![New shout hoverbox](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/badge.png)

# Profiles
- __Artist and album grids now have a reflection of their primary colour below__
- __The primary colour algorithm for said grids has been swapped out to make more sense__
    - Vibrant.js was in use previously which proved to not work very well for a lot of cases.
- The full timestamp is now shown in the track hoverbox
- Fixed album name appearing as your profile name if album covers are turned off in your recent tracks
    - The album name not being visible is not a bug, it's a sad limitation as the album cover is required for the album title.
- Updated the design of listening report promo buttons

![Grid glow](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/glow.png)

# Albums
- __The album cover now has a reflection of its primary colour below__

# Reports
- The top report card now matches your accent colour

# Library
- Viewing tracks in other people's libraries no longer crashes
- The 'jump to page' form is now finally styled properly

# UI
- __Your user link is now themed to your primary badge colour__
- Input boxes are now more visible in Light and Midnight themes
- Dropdown buttons in button groups now have an arrow animation again
- Sponsor and update buttons now use normal button styling

- Fixed alert icon disappearing when there was an error posting your shout/reply. Please try again. and again. and again.

# Inbox
- __Changed the design of notifications__
    - They now reflect the primary user colour, are more visible in the Midnight theme, and are language independent.
- __The header design for inbox pages has been redesigned__
- Message viewing now shows the user's primary colour on the left
    - I will redesign more of this page eventually but for now the header is also bigger.

# Notifications (bleh)
- __Changed the design and location of (bleh) notifications__
    - They can now include more detailed descriptions, handle icons better, appear longer, and are located on the right to get less in your way. I imagine in the future these notifications will be stored in a separate inbox.

# Seasonal
- Fixed negative timezone offsets breaking season calculations
    - It was calculating `-5000` instead of `-0500`, you will now see seasons again in these timezones.
- Fixed 'configure bleh' button showing text when no season is active
- Reduced height of card overlay gradients
- New Years now features a lesser ice overlay
    - Will be visible next year more clearly, less ice.

# macOS (Webkit)
thank you to @iwas15with100k for giving me a mac VM to test :3

- Fixed update checker breaking on Safari due to the version being wrapped in quotes
- Fixed incorrect height calculation of header causing it to be stuck at the top of the screen
- Fixed missing `-webkit-` prefixes for background blurs

# Settings
- __Redesigned the ignore list panel__
    - This now includes a new write-up of what 'ignoring' a user does, replacing the old one (which was also written by me, incase you were unaware).

![The evils](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/evils.png)

- __You can now configure avatar radius within the interface__
    - This existed for a whole year hidden but it's here now for those who want.
- The last.fm settings now uses the same header design as the rest of the site
- The subscription page has been modernised
- The automatic edits page now has a back button

# Events
- __Started redesign work on event edit and creation pages__

# Errors
- __When an error occurs, the dialog now shows detailed error information__
    - Helps massively if you are reporting issues.
- The page will no longer attempt to load if you reach a 404

# Setup
- The setup flow has had it's first redesign, with more to come until i'm happy with it

# Translations
- Bumped German (`de`) translations with help from @inozom

# Sponsors
- Updated sponsors for @iwas15with100k - thank you! (silly)

# Other
- Modals now use the same padding as cards
- Menus now have slight transparency and work consistently under different themes
- Changed the size of card headers to have an exact height of 32px
- Changelogs now include a data property for the build number
- Pages without `root` accessible will now prevent further load rather than crashing silently
- Fixed various instances where buttons using the `mimic-link` class were broken in the last release
- __Added debugging overlays for developing with bleh__
- Standardised user avatars to now use the legacy `--avatar-radius` css property
    - Now controlled as said previously in the settings interface.
- Fixed loading of settings css variables not respecting `unit` property
- `--g4` now matches `--l4` in saturation
- The css has been cleaned up a bit
- Changed the colour of the 'cute' special badge
- Updated design for feature flags page
- Fixed some minor leftovers in v4 listening reports
- Fixed inconsistent gap under top artist and album grids

2024.1231.2.name: Reports
2024.1231.2.bio:
i time travelled to release this in 2024

# Reports
- __New and old reports should now match Last.fm 1:1__
    - All bugs with the new design have been fixed (there weren't many).

2024.1231.name: 2024 NO MUSIC
2024.1231.bio:
happy new year :3 i hav a lot planned for tha new year IN #BLEH2025 #2025MUSIC

# New in 2024.1231.1
- __Seasonal calculations will now try to run in your current timezone__

# Charts

    - Horizontal scrolling is simulated by default but can be disabled if you are on a laptop or Something
- Chart number on artist and album pages now has a tooltip

![New charts page](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/charts.png)

# Wiki

- __Links in wikis now show the link type as an icon and a tooltip__

![New charts page](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/wiki-small.png)

# Seasonal
- Changed some minor things related to New Years

# Other
- Alert colours are now easier to distinguish
- Fixed activities registered in chartlists (love and obsess) not being lotus corrected
- Added custom reason for 'cute' badges

2024.1230.name: 2024 MUSIC
2024.1230.bio:
last release of 2024? maybe? happy early new year if so :3 2024 MUSIC

# Seasonal

    - It might be buggy and weird but that can be ironed out after this point.

# Profiles
- __Drastically improved speed of refreshing tracks by using minimal endpoint__
    - Not available in first release of 2024.1230 fwiw

# Sponsors

# Other
- Fixed missing fonts in places utilising the code font
    - Most noticeable with languages other than English
- Legacy modals now match the design of new modals

2024.1229.name: BLEEH
2024.1229.bio:
i'm not sure what is in this update it's been a few days but yeah :3

# Activities
- __You can now toggle off per activity type__
    - Found in the Profile tab.

# UI
- __Hovering over badges now shows the reason the badge was granted__
    - May be slightly work-in-progress in some areas? not sure

- __The style of view buttons (the grouped buttons) now matches navigation__
    - Working on a lot of consistency within bleh's overall design currently !!

# Browser
- __The tab title is now generated by bleh__
    - This allows for capitalisation corrections (with lotus) to be active mainly along with more consistency.

# Gallery
- You can now remove inaccessible saved images by right-clicking

# Tracks
- __Added 'search lyrics' button leading to Genius__

# Sponsors
- Updated sponsors for @Orofil - thank you!

# Other
- Fixed track artist positioning without an image
- Fixed sponsor modal text having text cursor
- Fixed minor positiong difference in listener/scrobble row
- Fixed bleh crash due to pages having broken artist links
    - Makaveli in this instance, due to the faulty redirect to 2Pac.

2024.1226.name: jollyyyyy
2024.1226.bio:
happy holidays!

# Sponsors
- Updated sponsors for @vwvwvwvwvwvwv - thank you!
- Fixed missing difference between monthly and one-time sponsors in interface

# Library
- Fixed crash when reloading a 2024 (this year) view due to 2025 preparations

2024.1225.name: jolly :3
2024.1225.bio:
MERRY CHRISTMAS i hope your day is oh so jolly! :3

# Sponsoring
- Sponsor and badge data is now automatically refreshed every 4 hours
    - This means a full bleh update is no longer required to grant or change badges, only a refresh of badges and a click of the update button.
- Updated sponsors for @astrablooms and @ItsProyal - thank you!

2024.1224.bio:
surprise present :3

# Sponsoring
- __You can now sponsor me on github!__
    - If you feel the work I put into bleh and bwaa is worthy of donations you are welcome to do so, but it is of course optional :3 thank you!!
    - Find the Sponsor link in your bleh settings !!

# Obsessions
- __Profile obsession lists now use grids__
    - This means good visibility in light theme, capitalisation corrections, random text overflow bugs fixed, etc. etc.

![New obsession page](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/obsess.png)

# Search
- __The search page has been redesigned__
    - All pages are now finally bleh-themed along with capitalisation corrections being active. The global search bar is now also automatically focused again after a search.

![New search page](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/search.png)

# Settings
- __Added 'skip to' list on some stacked pages__
    - Easily find what you're looking for with the quick links for available options.

![Skip to setting](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/skip_to.png)

# Activities
- Tag items are now properly supported in activity lists

# Other
- Fixed event attendance pages
- Fixed event where changelog fails to load due to parsing errors
- Fixed some random cursor oddities
- Removed legacy link to timezone in footer

2024.1223.name: Early presents
2024.1223.bio:
i am back after an AWFUL sickness with Lots of bleh-ness ready for christmas :3 its like a early present!!

# Navigation
- __Site-wide navigation has been modernised__
    - All tabs both at the top of the page and in subpages now resemble buttons and are much friendlier to click. A ringed outline is displayed around the currently focused tab.
- __The bleh settings now uses a row of tabs__
    - Finally matching the native last.fm settings
    - A lot of tabs with similar goals have been merged to make way for this change too, more steps to a less confusing settings.
- __The site-wide search bar is now easily accessible__
    - Rather than being hidden behind a broken button with an aging design it's now all front and centre!!
- __The current season along with a counter replaces the bleh settings button__
    - Hover over to see you can now get a live counter running when on the 'Seasonal' tab in settings :3

![New tabs](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/tabs.png)

![Search anywhere](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/search_anywhere.png)

![Live counting seasons](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/live.png)

# Performance
- __Intended performance tweaks are now in full effect__
    - This one performance tweak was supposed to be included a month or two ago but had a simple misspelling causing it not to work fully, now it does. In my testing, this is very very close to native speeds depending on the page now !!

# Auto-edits
- __The management page for album and track edits is finally done__
    - Up until this point the page had been left completely untouched since the bleh2 version of bleh (we're technically on 3 now). The white background seen with the Bulk Edit extension is also fixed.

![Auto-edit page](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/edit.png)

# Shouts
- __The design for shout actions has changed to a popover__
    - This may be controversial! I get it, but i'd hope you can give it a try for a while before leaving feedback as a change being new can usually cause more hate than actually deserved. As always options can be provided for you to fine-tune the look you want in the future if this is wanted.

![Shout popover](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/shout.png)

# Music
- "A cappella" is now detected as a valid acapella variation
- Artist and album grid gloss overlay is fixed

# Settings
- The design for toggles and sliders has progressed
- Your avatar is now registered as the background properly
- Added a cute deep blue seasonal colour #toradora

# Translations
- Bumped Deutsch translation a bit with help from @inozom
- Fixed some missing translation keys causing errors
- Fixed missing translation keys language-wide for no season

# Other
- Fixed chart colours not updating when changing colour
- Redesigned input boxes slightly
- Minor page fixes
- Fixed seasonal colour alert height
- Removed bwaa leftovers in activities
- Adjusted some ice overlays particularily in menus

2024.1213.name: nonsense
2024.1213.bio:
# Seasonal
- __Added seasonal-exclusive colours__
    - such a nonsense christmas.... @inozom

![fruitcake](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/fruitcake.png)

# Fonts
- Added Noto Sans KR & TC for Korean and Traditional Chinese

# Shouts
- Fix shouts not being patched on track pages

# Other
- Changed styling of selection border on appearance page
    - Will probably be looked at again soon
- Changed styling of alerts to be less ugly

2024.1211.name: so chilly...
2024.1211.bio:
its getting veri veri cold... >w<

# Seasonal
- __Upgraded seasonal snow effects__
    - This release comes with improved performance to the snow thanks to completely refactored code. 4 nerds: animations r now handled in css instead of js
    - There is also now a fancy glow accompanying the 2x amount of snow particles :3
    - Performance options are still available in the settings as per usual

![Seasonal configuration](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/snow.png)

# Other
- Fixed potential page failures due to shout patching and smart music titles

2024.1210.name: glacier library pt. 2
2024.1210.bio:
# Library
- __Added ability to show library bar view vertically__
    - This matches default last.fm behaviour if that is what you prefer.

![New library bar configuration](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/bar_v.png)

- Styled grid view page when browsing without Pro

# Profiles
- Fixed configure menu for Artists and Albums
    - Now properly supports List and Default view

# Seasonal
- The current season panel has been refreshed

![New seasonal interface](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/seasonal.png)

# Other
- Fixed some translations causing page failure
- Updating dialog should be less prone to duplicating

# Included in 2024.1210.1

2024.1208.name: glacier library ^-^
2024.1208.bio:
i hope people enjoy tha library as i am quite proud of it myselfs.. ~w~ leave feedback in bleh issues if there's something you hav to suggest!

# Library
- __Introduced new awesome library redesign__
    - This has been a long-time coming and is a whole redesign of all aspects of the user library :3 Below i'll go through each change worth mentioning

![New library](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/glacier_library.png)

- __The date graph is now custom-built with three display modes__
    - You can now choose between a line graph, pie chart, and bar chart. This preference is saved between tabs. You can click points on the graph just the same as before.
    - The date selector now also includes a handy link to the current year (2024) just in time for the end of the year.
    - Line graphs also now have their background colour a pretty gradient and that's cool!!!
    - There is a (probably slightly) higher chance you can get rate-limited now but in a world where using the Bulk Edit extension can load hundreds of pages that doesn't seem to be much of an issue. It's also a worthy compromise for pretty graphs i think.
    - If you absolutely HATE these graphs and want the old one back, simply use the handy configure button present on all library pages (or head to the Music tab in settings).

- __There are now additional 'insight' graphs based on the current tab__
    - These can show information on artists, albums, and tracks on a page (you can't have all three on page, you can have two at least). Hover over each slice of the pie to see what the item in question is, unfortunately clicking into them is not available... yet (will get to this soon hopefully).
    - No additional network requests are made for this graph to work as it utilises either the chartlist or grid already loaded :3
    - These do not appear on the scrobbles tab!!!

![New library graphs](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/glacier_graphs.png)

- __Header cards on regular tabs are redesigned__
    - This redesign is the most similar to the previous design but essentially matches the rest of the recent bleh designs :3 This includes moving relavant buttons into their own group on the right with helpful text labels and icons.

- __Header cards when focused on an artist, album, or track have been redesigned too__
    - Along with the aftermentioned improvements, this panel now uses the lotus correction system. This supports the popular Bulk Edit extension out of the box so no need to worry there either.
    - Let me know if there's other extensions people use that hook into this area and are as such no longer visible in bleh, i'm not aware of any at the moment.

![Bulk edit integration](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/bulk.png)

- Artists in list view are now finally corrected
- Albums and tracks in list view should now be corrected properly regardless as language

- Tracks now show hover popups pretty much everywhere

# Profiles
- Recent (and) track panel configure menus now include bleh options
    - Very handy for some people most likely (including me for testing)
- Fixed activites sometimes displaying in a weird order

![Configuration menu](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/configure.png)

# Header
- Massively improved performance on the profile menu
    - This was done by completely removing the old menu provided by Last.fm which was still causing some slowdowns despite not being visible (silly)

# Other
- Changelogs now display myself in the header
    - Maybe other people will write changelogs someday o.O

- Chart colours are now only loaded when necessary, giving a potential (but minor) performance improvement.
- The same as above but for removing album-related page colouring when you exit a page.

2024.1204.name: glacier :3
2024.1204.bio:
merry christmas to those who celebrate :333 its my birthday this month so um wish me a happy birthday if u desire ~w~

# Library
- __Artist and album grids have been slightly modernised__
    - The primary colour from the image is now picked and used for the lower gradient as appose to the boring solid black. The line for the artist name and plays has now also been merged into one - if people would like this to be a setting, let me know :3
    - Pre-requisite to the upcoming library redesign <3

![New library grids](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/grid.png)

- Tracks no longer have a slide animation

# Pages
- __Page-related code now only runs once per page__
    - This feels WAY faster in my testing before release. While this may seem like a straightforward thing in retrospect it was a little more difficult than you'd expect. Using the system mentioned below and some additional tweaks it now no longer needs to run as much code to get the job done.
    - Along with this, recent activities and settings are no longer constantly loaded whenever any action is taken.
- Pages are now assigned automatically
    - This may not mean much unless you know how bleh works under-the-hood. To keep it simple, bleh is now smarter!! and can tell what type of page you are browsing on without having to do nearly as much detective work.

- Panel headers are now the same size as in bleh settings
    - Experimenting as usual! While it may feel off at first i'm sure people will get used to it.

- Listening reports have had some styling tweaks
    - (finally) enjoy your reports taking the full page width (and no broken yearly day charts!)

- The noise overlay is removed (temporarily?) (forever?)
    - just experimenting ~w~

# Seasonal
- Winter ice effects have been re-made from scratch!!
    - New overlays are also present at the top of the page, on interactables (buttons, toggles), and under navigation
- Seasonal overlays have had their look tweaked
    - The gradient no longer spans the entire card height, it's now only at the top as intended. This makes midnight theme a lot more oled-y during winter seasons.
- Slight optimisations have been made for seasonal overlay things
- Colours related to the Christmas season have had some changes

![Profile page during Christmas](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/glacier.png)

# Profiles
- Panel buttons on the main page have had a fresh coat of paint

# Dialogs and modals
- Dialogs have been completely re-built within bleh
    - If you can't notice a difference that's a good thing, I feel like they perform better but that might be placebo but who knows..

# Listeners
- __Top listeners for artists now match follow pages__
    - This means you can now choose between the same list and grid view modes and they will match this setting globally.
    - The position counter is now also accurate after page 1! This was originally added before bleh3 when this wasn't really possible, but that is no more.

# Shouts
- An initial attempt has been made to increase performance.
    - It isn't perfect at this time but shouts are now queued to have their fancy new-lines, bold text, etc. If there's some way to make this work in parallel it would help a lot.

# Other
- Dropdown selection buttons now flip their arrow when active
    - The arrow has also been swapped out

2024.1201.name: Reports
2024.1201.bio: Fixed listening reports not showing top card most likely due to new Last.fm changes.

2024.1120.name: Redesign improvements
2024.1120.bio:
This update is a little late (i got sidetracked) but it is now released in a complete-enough state. More changes will come when i'm a little more focused on the blehs.

# Settings
- __Continued redesign of bleh settings__
    - This was very much needed and will continue overtime :3
    - Settings now uses the header redesign seen across the site (not all icons are finished yet)
    - The 'Appearance' tab has seen a shift in layout too, with added subtext and the album colour toggle moved up to the colour selection (where it should've been)
- __'Customise' has changed into a new 'Layout' tab__
    - Here will be the home for customising page layouts for your profile, artists, albums, etc.
    - New in this tab is the ability to customise the action upon clicking avatars (default is still expand to full resolution) and the handy 'view photos' button on the right of artist pages.

![Layout tab](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/layout.png)

# Editing
- Fixed toggles being unable to click
    - Labels were still clickable but this was still annoying

2024.1113.name: Major redesign season
2024.1113.bio:
its hereeeeee :3 This is a bug push towards a formal bleh release and checks off a lot of boxes. bleh is very very chilly..

# Redesigns
- __Completely redesigned headers for events, albums, tracks, artists, and profiles__
    - This update is crucial in removing legacy bleh leftovers. As of now, these headers are fully custom-built and moves away from the precisely positioned header and navigation seen before. In simple terms, this makes the code much more straightforward and allows more flexibility to be possible with these designs in the future.
    - Top-left avatars are all clickable to reveal the highest quality image (same with event posters)
    - Track pages can now show the featured album cover in the top-left (not on subpages unfortunately)
    - Blurred backgrounds now appear on all these pages of the current image. For profiles, this can be configured in the settings much like before.

![Artist page](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/artist.png)

- __Event pages have finally been redesigned__
    - Following with the header changes, event pages have seen a much needed refresh - go try it out :3
    - Lists of events on profiles and artist pages have also taken on this refresh.
    - Attendance pages now also include the view selector.
    - Some final tweaks may be made in the coming months or generally overtime.

![Event page](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/event.png)

- The top-right profile menu is now custom-built
    - You may not notice a difference which is intentional, this simply improves performance drastically especially on old tabs.
- __The About artist panel has been redesigned__
    - Along with an updated design, this panel can now also display guest features on a song if enabled in settings.

![About artist panel](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/about.png)

# Profiles
- __You can now right-click the similar taste item to compare artists__

![Taste right-click menu](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/taste.png)

- You can now right-click tracks to view the menu
    - This will be used on artist/album grids and more in the future. For those who aren't too happy with it, an option will be available later on to disable.

![Track right-click menu](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/menu.png)

- __Configure menus now use the redesigned settings interface__
    - Very pretty :3

![Recent tracks menu](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/recent-menu.png)

- You can now see badges in user lists (eg. following list)
    - This also means you can see staff users more easily.

- Auto-edit windows now use bleh toggles as appose to checkboxes
    - Along with this there are some very minor spacing fixes.

# Customisation
- __You can now control background saturation__
    - The saturation of backgrounds in dark themes can now be further controlled from the accent saturation using the new background saturation slider.
    - You can see this in action earlier in this changelog :3

![Background saturation slider](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/saturation.png)

# Seasonal
- Season timings are now standardised solely in GMT+0000
    - While this may sound like a bad thing, this ensures there's no gap between one season ending and the other beginning (hopefully). Worth it in the end.

- Seasonal effects have had their (hopefully) final tweaks for Fall
- You can now decrease the amount of snow if needed for performance or accessibility

# Tags
- Tag pages have been given an initial redesign
    - More is to come in the future

2024.1109.name: Wiki improvements and more
2024.1109.bio:
# Wikis
- __Wiki pages have been redesigned__
    - This is less of a grand redesign compared to the recent gallery changes but still a massive improvement for those wiki editing (like myself)

![Wiki overview page](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/wiki.png)

Wiki overviews now have the two common action buttons located for easy access in the sidebar. The most recent wiki author is now also inline with the title.

![Wiki edit page](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/wiki-edit.png)

Wiki editing has received the biggest improvement in this update. The previously available wiki syntax guide is now accompanied with a selection of 6 symbol presets that can be used for writing wikis. These includes two stylised quotation marks, apostrophes, and two variations of the dash. Style rules have also been re-located into the sidebar to reduce the scrolling needed to save.

![Wiki history page](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/wiki-history.png)

The wiki history has now been updated to fit the overall aesthetic of today's bleh, including longer summaries depending on username width. These items now also display custom user badges and highlight staff members.

# Profiles
- Hovering over scrobbles now once again displays average
- Fixed icons for bookmarks in recent activity

# Theming
- __Massively improved readability in light theme__
    - There will most likely be one final pass on readability but here is a batch of improvements :3
    - Shadows beneath buttons have been decreased
    - New, pro, and vote badges now use a darker text
    - Notification bubbles now use a darker colour

# General
- Some web requests can now handle error responses
    - This allows bleh to recover in the event lotus or the changelog cannot be downloaded

2024.1108.name: Building on profiles
2024.1108.bio:
# Obsessions and messaging
- __Featured tracks on profiles have been re-implemented__

![Featured track panel seen below profile bio](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/obsession.png)

This involves more under-the-hood changes than in actual appearance but to keep it simple this replaces another janky leftover of bleh². I also took this opportunity to:
- __Move private messaging button to the follow row__

![Message button in its new location](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/message.png)

# Changelog system
- Improved styling of changelog items
- Added a button at the bottom of the modal to quickly shortcut to the latest major release (will be relocated most likely)

# Seasonal
- Announce new season change via notification

# General
- Fixed transparent cards (eg. full avatar windows) having borders in some themes

2024.1107.1.name: Checking off the list
2024.1107.1.bio:
- __Fixed image saving system for artists under `+noredirect`__
- Standardise changelog styling on all pages
- Standardise styling of modals and dropdowns
- Using the saved image tab shortcut no longer swaps back to the tab when changing pages

2024.1107.name: changelogs :3
2024.1107.bio:
Update changelogs are now available version per version, detailing updates in each build. Speaking of, here are the changes today:

- __Added a quick link to saved artist photos__

![Gallery image](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/saved_photos.png)

- First pass of light theme readability, there is more to come in the future
- Some top panel buttons have been moved into a ... menu for artists, albums, and tracks
- Custom charts now correctly update on theme change
- Minor bulk edit colour fix
- Improve optimisation of staff shouts and colour staff profiles

More changelogs will be added both retroactively to previous releases (cus there were cool ones trust) and for all future updates so you can stay informed on the update spam. I'm preparing for a true milestone release of bleh at some point so expect a lot of stability and general improvements to arrive in the run-up.

2024.1106.1.name: Gallery redesign is now live
2024.1106.1.bio:
Following (kinda) coincidentally with Last.fm's debut of album image saving, bleh now features a fully redesigned gallery page.

![Redesigned gallery image](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/bleh3-gallery.png)

# A walkthrough
Gallery pages have been restructured to place primary focus on the image in question, now stretching across both columns. To further help this, a new 'Expand' button is located below to view the image in it's full resolution. Along with this, a vote tally is now displayed taking the positive votes minus the negative votes to give you the current number used for ordering.

2024.1106.name: Last.fm fixes
2024.1106.bio: Pre-update fixes for Last.fm's latest auto-edit changes.
